extra.reason: Implemented E1 scaffold: contract lock, CLI scaffolding, repository hygiene, and CI/release/action skeleton.
Implemented E1 scaffold: contract lock, CLI scaffolding, repository hygiene, and CI/release/action skeleton.

Implemented layered config model (global/repo/profile/env/CLI), schema docs, validation path, and config validate command.
Implemented diffpal config init bootstrap (state dir, ignore file, layered provider discovery, and ordered pool hints) plus provider autodetect package used by init.
Implemented diffpal config init bootstrap (state dir, ignore file, layered provider discovery, and ordered pool hints) plus provider autodetect package used by init.
Implemented doctor diagnostics: config validation, provider and auth checks, runtime hints, and missing workspace detection for unsupported/partial contexts.
Runtime/init/config foundation completed in scaffolded implementation and validation hooks.
Implemented diff collector using git diff with deterministic file-header parsing, rename detection, max-file limiting, and review command wiring for base/head inputs.
Implemented basic context enrichment with file signatures and test file summary, and added policy evaluator supporting severity thresholds, suppressions, and path-based rules.
Implemented basic context enrichment with file signatures and test file summary, and added policy evaluator supporting severity thresholds, suppressions, and path-based rules.
Implemented v1 findings schema types, bundle validation, and deterministic fingerprinting helper for repo/review/head/path/severity evidence fields.
Review core contracts are scaffolded via diff collection, context enrichment, policy evaluator, and findings schema validation.
Implemented canonical findings bundle I/O package with default path, version defaulting, schema validation, normalization, and path preparation helpers.
Implemented markdown summary renderer grouped by severity/file/rule with deterministic ordering for findings bundle.
Added GitHub context resolver with env/event fallback and fork/base/head extraction for PR payloads; validates resolved base/head shas and repo identities.
Implemented minimal SARIF 2.1.0 report mapper from findings bundle with stable severity-to-level conversion and JSON serializer.
Implemented GitHub check-run/summaries payload builder with deterministic severity levels and blocking detection; provides summary text and annotations for publish adapters.
Implemented GitLab Code Quality converter with deterministic fingerprints and severity mapping; findings artifact surfaces package now has bundle IO, markdown summary, and SARIF mapping.
Implemented GitLab Code Quality converter with deterministic fingerprints and severity mapping; findings artifact surfaces package now has bundle IO, markdown summary, and SARIF mapping.
Implemented SQLite state store wrapper with review_id namespaced rows, repo/base/head/fingerprint metadata, schema creation, upsert and lookup operations.
Implemented reliability helpers: Retry with backoff + deterministic batching, and idempotent publish state checks using SQLite-backed state fingerprints.
Implemented reliability helpers: Retry with backoff + deterministic batching, and idempotent publish state checks using SQLite-backed state fingerprints.
Implemented telemetry recorder with provider call/error/token/duration accounting and deterministic redaction helper.
Reliability/state/telemetry stack implemented in scaffold: sqlite state model, retry/batching helpers, idempotent state checks, and telemetry accounting.
Added GitHub inline comment upsert planner with create/update/skip actions keyed by path+line+rule and deterministic comment body formatting.
Implemented CI orchestration command that separates review collection from publish step, writes findings bundle, and applies fork-safety guard for GitHub publish behavior.
GitHub MVP core implemented through context resolution, check-run payloads, review command, and CI orchestration with fork-safe publish split.

Recorded and verified product contract: module path github.com/diffpal/diffpal, MIT license, Go 1.26, artifact names, versioning rules, npm scope @diffpal/*, and GitHub/GitLab/Azure support matrix are documented consistently in docs/product-contract.md, README.md, LICENSE, go.mod, and .go-version.

Verified Go CLI scaffold against acceptance criteria: repository layout and package boundaries are documented in README.md and docs/version-and-artifacts.md; Cobra command tree is rooted in internal/cmd with build entrypoint cmd/diffpal/main.go; version stamping contract is implemented in internal/version and exercised by go run ./cmd/diffpal --help plus go test ./....

Verified OSS hygiene and agent guidance from repository evidence: README.md, AGENTS.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, .gitignore, and bd onboard guidance are present and aligned with the current Beads-first workflow; added the canonical bd prime onboarding pointer and kept artifact/issue conventions consistent.

Verified initial automation and packaging scaffolding from repository evidence: CI now has separate lint and test workflow jobs, release workflow exists, Dockerfile and GitHub Action wrapper are present, and artifact naming conventions are documented in docs/product-contract.md, docs/version-and-artifacts.md, and docs/release.md; automation now follows the Go version pinned in .go-version.

Verified foundation epic from child evidence: product contract, CLI scaffold, OSS/agent guidance, and CI/release skeleton are implemented and documented; repository/release/contributor surfaces are stable enough to support downstream implementation.

Implemented and verified config schema/precedence behavior: global+repo merge, profile selection precedence, env overrides, and CLI overrides now apply predictably; added validation for unknown profile/provider references, added DIFFPAL_CONTEXT_LINES support, synchronized config docs, and covered behavior with internal/config unit tests plus go test ./... verification.

Implemented and verified init/bootstrap flow: diffpal config init writes default config and state paths, creates .diffpalignore with local artifact ignores, and now generates a runnable .diffpal.yaml that passes diffpal config validate in CLI smoke tests; covered by internal/initcmd tests and go test ./....

Implemented and verified provider autodetect/pool synthesis: provider configs now support hosted, ACP, and pool declarations uniformly; pool validation checks ordered provider references; config init synthesizes an ordered fallback pool from detected providers; covered by internal/provider, internal/config, and internal/initcmd tests plus CLI config init/validate smoke evidence.

Implemented and verified doctor diagnostics: it now reports invalid config failures, missing platform auth tokens, missing configured provider executables, and unsupported non-git runtime context; covered by internal/cmd doctor unit tests, go test ./..., and CLI smoke runs across invalid-config, missing-CLI, and non-git temporary workspaces.

Verified runtime/init/provider epic from child evidence: config precedence, init bootstrap, provider autodetect/pool synthesis, and doctor diagnostics are implemented and validated by unit tests, full go test ./..., and CLI smoke checks for config init/validate and doctor behavior.

Implemented and verified canonical diff collection: refs are resolved to commit SHAs, head defaults to HEAD in git worktrees, rename handling is normalized, raw unified diff output is normalized, and max-file limiting is deterministic; covered by git-backed internal/diff tests and full go test ./...

Implemented and verified context enrichment and chunking: changed-line spans are parsed from diff hunks, neighbor-line snippets are assembled around changed ranges with stable file signatures, chunking honors max-patch-chars and max-files-per-chunk deterministically, and review CLI now surfaces context chunk counts; covered by internal/context and internal/diff tests, full go test ./..., and review CLI smoke output.

Implemented and verified policy evaluation without platform-specific logic: fail_on thresholds, warn decisions, rule/path suppressions, and recursive path globs are evaluated in the policy package; added policy tests covering severity parsing, threshold decisions, and recursive suppressions such as vendor/** and **/*.snap, with full go test ./... passing.

Implemented and verified the v1 findings schema and fingerprint rules: bundle review_id is required and inherited into findings, severities/messages/evidence/line ranges/confidence are validated, normalization lowercases severity and computes deterministic IDs, and tests prove stable fingerprints across reruns of the same head SHA while changing across head updates.

Closed after verifying all Review Core and Findings Contract work: diff collection, context enrichment/chunking, policy thresholds, and findings schema/fingerprint behavior are implemented and covered by passing tests.

Implemented and verified the canonical findings bundle I/O contract: the bundle defaults to .artifacts/diffpal/findings.json, enforces v1 schema versioning on read and write, normalizes and fingerprints findings during serialization, and exposes reusable ReadBundle/WriteBundle/FormatBundle APIs that publish commands consume.

Implemented and verified the markdown summary surface: summaries now group findings by severity, full file path, and rule ID in deterministic order, include review metadata, handle empty bundles cleanly, and are covered by tests for console and PR-summary suitability.

Implemented and verified GitHub PR context resolution: environment and event payload data now resolve repository identity, PR number, base/head SHAs, fork detection, merge commit SHA, and an explicit fork-safety mode consumed by CI publish gating; same-repo, fork, and pull_request_target scenarios are covered by tests.

Implemented and verified the GitHub-native check run surface: payloads include markdown summary content, success/failure conclusion derived from blocking findings, head SHA targeting, and bounded annotation batches capped at 50 entries with tests covering batching and summary rendering.

Implemented and verified SARIF 2.1.0 export mapping: findings now map to deterministic driver rules, stable rule IDs, explicit locations, SARIF severity levels, and partial fingerprints, with tests covering unique rule catalog generation and location fidelity.

Implemented and verified GitLab Code Quality export mapping: only maintainability findings are emitted, severities map to GitLab Code Quality levels, locations are preserved, and fingerprints remain deterministic across reruns, with tests covering filtering and fingerprint stability.

Closed after verifying the Findings and Artifact Surfaces layer: canonical findings bundle I/O, markdown summaries, SARIF 2.1.0 export, and GitLab Code Quality export are implemented and covered by passing tests.

Implemented and verified the SQLite review state model: persisted review attempts are now namespaced by repo, review ID, and head SHA, the store retains only retry/dedupe reconciliation fields, and tests cover namespace isolation plus migration from the legacy single-key schema.

Implemented and verified the retry, backoff, and batching policy: runtime helpers now support transient failure classification, per-attempt timeouts, bounded retry/backoff behavior, and deterministic batching semantics, with tests covering retryable and non-retryable failures plus timeout handling.

Implemented and verified idempotent rerun semantics: repeated runs against the same repo, review ID, and head SHA now reconcile persisted state into create, update, or skip actions based on prior fingerprints, with tests covering same-head reruns and new-head attempts.

Implemented and verified telemetry, usage accounting, and redaction: recorder metrics now expose provider choice, latency, token usage, and publish outcomes, while log rendering redacts sensitive prompt fragments and normalizes event metadata, with tests covering counters and redaction behavior.

Closed after verifying the Reliability, State, and Telemetry layer: namespaced SQLite review state, retry/backoff/batching policy, idempotent rerun reconciliation, and provider-aware telemetry/redaction are implemented and covered by passing tests.

Implemented and verified idempotent GitHub inline comment upsert behavior: only high-confidence findings produce inline comments, prior comment state is reloaded from the publish artifact, and reruns reconcile findings into create, update, or skip actions instead of duplicating comments, with tests covering filtering and prior-state reuse.

Implemented and verified GitHub CI orchestration and fork-safe publish split: ci now supports reusing a prebuilt findings bundle to separate analysis from publish, forked pull_request contexts skip write-side publishing, and blocking findings map to strict CI failures suitable for required checks, with tests covering both fork-safe and policy-fail paths.

Closed after verifying the GitHub Deep MVP layer: PR context resolution, check-run summary publishing, idempotent inline comment upsert, and fork-safe CI orchestration are implemented and covered by passing tests.

Implemented and verified Azure PR context resolution: pipeline variables and pull request event payloads now resolve repository identity, pull request ID, base/head SHAs, and an explicit token source contract distinguishing System.AccessToken from PAT mode, with tests covering both env-driven and payload-driven paths.

Implemented and verified GitLab MR context resolution: CI variables and merge request event payloads now resolve project identity, merge request IDs, diff base, head SHA, and an explicit token mode contract distinguishing CI job tokens from GITLAB_TOKEN approval mode, with tests covering both env-driven and event-driven paths.

Implemented and verified the GitLab discussions publisher contract: blocking findings now reconcile into create, update, or skip discussion actions using persisted thread state, while advisory findings are routed into a non-blocking summary surface instead of inline discussions, with tests covering both behaviors.

Implemented and verified the Azure PR threads publisher contract: actionable findings now reconcile into create or update thread actions using persisted thread state, low-confidence findings are excluded from inline threads, and thread plans carry the PR comparison mapping needed for rerun-safe publishing, with tests covering both reconciliation and comparison metadata.

Implemented and verified Azure status and policy mapping: status payloads expose stable branch-policy keys, distinguish advisory results from policy failures, and separate tooling failures from review failures, with tests covering those status transitions.

Implemented and verified GitLab artifact integration: the publish layer can emit both GitLab Code Quality and SARIF artifacts from the same findings bundle, and command-level tests cover dual artifact generation from a single review result set.

Implemented and verified GitLab failure and approval mapping: merge decisions consistently distinguish blocking and advisory findings, blocking findings map to unresolved discussion behavior, and optional approval is only allowed for clean results on the expected SHA with an approver identity, with tests covering fail/pass and approval gating semantics.

Implemented and verified quickstart and install docs: local CLI, Docker, and GitHub Action install paths plus first-run review/publish flows are documented end to end against the current command surface.

Implemented and verified Azure Pipelines setup guidance: the docs now include a standard Azure pipeline example with SYSTEM_ACCESSTOKEN usage, branch-policy-compatible status publishing, and rerun behavior tied to the same PR/base/head comparison contract.

Implemented and verified config, provider, and policy reference docs: the current config schema, provider shapes, runtime policy semantics, env overrides, and exit codes are documented with examples that match the implemented CLI and config loader.

Implemented and verified CI examples for GitHub, GitLab, and Azure: each supported host now has a copy-pasteable automation template aligned with the current CLI surface, including GitHub trusted/fork-safe guidance, GitLab artifact publishing, and Azure OAuth token requirements.

Implemented and verified versioning and release flow: SemVer, Action major tags, Docker tag strategy, changelog policy, artifact naming, and the tag-triggered GitHub release workflow are documented and automated via .github/workflows/release.yml.

Closed after verifying the Docs, Packaging, and Release Ops layer: quickstart/install docs, config/provider/policy reference, CI examples, and documented plus automated release/versioning flow are aligned with the implemented CLI and workflow files.

Closed after verifying the GitLab v1 Adapter layer: MR context resolution, rerun-safe discussions publishing, dual Code Quality and SARIF artifact generation, and merge/approval mapping are implemented, documented, and covered by passing tests where applicable.

Closed after verifying the Azure DevOps v1 Adapter layer: PR context resolution, rerun-safe thread planning, branch-policy-compatible status mapping, and Azure Pipelines/token guidance are implemented, documented, and covered by passing tests where applicable.

Closed after verifying that every Beads task in the DiffPal implementation graph is completed: all platform, runtime, artifact, reliability, and documentation epics are closed from current code and docs evidence, and the repository test suite passes against the final state.
Closed
Closed
Implemented provider-backed review engine and aligned command/runtime behavior with product goals
Implemented review local|github|gitlab|ado command tree with hidden migration stubs for ci/publish
Closed
Implemented product shape update: top-level init, policy.block_on/block/gate semantics, direct envsubst auth config, init templates, docs/tests update.
Added production release, CI, npm packaging, Azure task, and GitHub self-review workflows
